tasks.task_description: Phase 1: Probe Q API directly via q_direct.py for each candidate model
Phase 2: Diff verified-OK list against plugin config.yaml, bridge FALLBACK_MODELS, hermes config.yaml
Phase 3: Apply adjustments to all three sources if drift found
Phase 4: Verify bridge catalog + smoke test end-to-end

description: Run no-q-CLI model calibration loop: Phase 1 probe via q_direct, Phase 2 diff, Phase 3 adjust, Phase 4 verify
